zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Launcelyn於1458年出生在英國哈普爾艾可波利時，她的父親John Launcelyn24歲，母親Mrs. John Launcelyn24歲。她於大約1470年與William Dormer在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和12個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年9月22日在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Launcelyn于1458年出生在英国哈普爾艾可波利时，她的父亲John Launcelyn24岁，母亲Mrs. John Launcelyn24岁。她于大约1470年与William Dormer在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和12个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年9月22日在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Launcelyn was born in 1458, in Exbury, Hampshire, England, her father, John Launcelyn, was 24 and her mother, Mrs. John Launcelyn, was 24. She married William Dormer about 1470, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 12 daughters. She died on 22 September 1506, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Launcelyn est née en 1458, à Exbury, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, John Launcelyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Launcelyn, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé William Dormer environ 1470, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 12 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1506, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Launcelyn 1458 in Exbury, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Launcelyn 24 und ihre Mutter Mrs. John Launcelyn 24. Sie hat um 1470 in England William Dormer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. September 1506 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England.

Lei sposato William Dormer circa 1470, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 22 settembre 1506, nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Launcelynが1458年にイギリスハンプシュアイアエクスブリーで生まれた時，父John Launcelynは24歳，母Mrs. John Launcelynは24歳であった。約1470年にイギリスでWilliam Dormerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1506年9月22日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Launcelyn(이)가 1458년 영국 함프실르 스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Launcelyn(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Launcelyn(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국에서 William Dormer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 9월 22일 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Launcelyn nasceu em 1458, em Exbury, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Launcelyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Launcelyn, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com William Dormer aproximadamente 1470, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 12 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1506, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Launcelyn родилась в 1458 г. в местности эксбури, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Launcelyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Launcelyn, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dormer около 1470 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 12 дочерей. Она умерла 22 сентября 1506 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
